issues_found.description: Published origin/main is missing WIN-070 and multiple decider patches (ISS-2095 + ISS-2167). Decider run 2026-05-20T21:15Z produced additional local commit edf2612a that 403'd on push due to PAT issue. Published site is now behind by >=4 decider runs. Build reproducibility check could not be executed (disk full).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Operator must push from a working clone using the current PAT. Run: git -C /tmp/edit-clone push origin main. Also fix workspace-sync to re-enable automated push recovery.

issues_found.description: workspace-sync agent has not run since 2026-05-17T14:05:49Z — now 4+ days. Last run report in workspace: run-2026-05-17T14-05-49Z.json. No run reports since. Files accumulated since then are FUSE-only and will be lost if workspace is recycled.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Operator restart of dome-workspace-sync scheduled task. Also investigate why the task stopped. Decider confirmed push 403 — workspace-sync may also be failing on push.

issues_found.description: Sandbox /tmp filesystem is 100% full. Old clones from prior sessions (/tmp/kev-publish, /tmp/dome-sync-clone) cannot be deleted (other-user owned). This prevented running the build reproducibility check — the most critical single check this agent performs.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Disk full is a systemic sandbox issue. No operator action possible. Document limitation in report. Note: the build result is known-stale from ISS-2167 regardless.

issues_found.description: FUSE-only file accumulation continues. ISS-2168 tracked 34 files as of 2026-05-20 integrity run. workspace-sync has been down 4+ days so all new curmudgeon reviews, decisions, and analyst work written since 2026-05-17 remain at risk. The 0 WS-only result in this run reflects the git clone state matching the last sync point — not a resolution.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Fix workspace-sync outage (see ISS-2166). Once sync resumes, FUSE-only files will be committed to git automatically.

summary: Overall status: FAIL. Two pre-existing critical outages continue: (1) Published site (origin/main) is stale — missing WIN-070 and multiple decider patches (ISS-2167); the decider's latest run (2026-05-20T21:15Z) produced commit edf2612a that also failed to push (PAT 403 error), worsening the gap. (2) workspace-sync has been down 4+ days since 2026-05-17T14:05Z (ISS-2166), leaving all agent output since that date as FUSE-only and at risk of loss (ISS-2168). Both require operator intervention. A new finding this run: the sandbox /tmp filesystem was 100% full (old cross-session clones), preventing the build reproducibility check — the most important single check — from executing. This is a systemic limitation, not a new project bug. All other checks passed: internal links clean (3679 tests, 0 failures), 12 tabs properly structured, all 72 WIN anchors present, progressive disclosure intact, 0 hardcoded colors in sections.json, discoverability files well-formed, curmudgeon digest healthy (2 unprocessed, within normal lag), drift audit fresh (48.1h, 13 candidates). Two expansion tracker moderate issues are new: EXP-429 and EXP-430 are complete but still in live array (should be archived), and EXP-425 has been stale-pending for >48h. ISS-2098 and ISS-2099 appear resolved at file level (EXP-395-398 now tracked, 0 workspace-only expansions) — decider should verify and close.
